points.tail_title_en: Open / high-scoring game, Upset / underdog win
Open / high-scoring game, Upset / underdog win

selected_scores.rationale_en: The match opens up end to end, with both attacks converting chances.
Switzerland extend the lead after breaking down the opposition defense.
The match shifts into a high-risk open tempo, with space behind the defensive line continuing to expand.
Algeria fully convert their counterattacks or attacking efficiency and extend the lead.

If it goes to penalties, goalkeeper and taker depth only support a slight structural lean toward Switzerland; the match is pulled into a high-risk open tempo, with space behind the defensive line continuing to grow.

tail_focus.rationale_en: The match shifts into a more open tempo, with transitions, set pieces, or expanded space after a lead, pushing total goals well above the main low-score prediction focus.

tail_focus.definition_en: Either side wins by at least 3 goals.
tail_focus.rationale_en: An early goal, card pressure, fatigue, or defensive imbalance makes the match uneven, with one side pulling clearly ahead within 90 minutes.

selected_scores.rationale_en: Algeria take a one-goal lead through pressing or transitions.
Algeria take a one-goal lead through pressing or transitions.
Algeria fully convert their counterattacks or attacking efficiency and extend the lead.
Algeria fully convert their counterattacks or attacking efficiency and extend the lead.

If it goes to penalties, goalkeeper and taker depth only support a slight structural lean toward Switzerland; the match is pulled into a high-risk open tempo, with space behind the defensive line continuing to grow.

tail_focus.definition_en: The side less favored pre-match or in the main prediction wins in 90 minutes.
tail_focus.rationale_en: The underdog can change the result within 90 minutes through low-block resilience, counterattack efficiency, set pieces, or key mistakes by the favorite.

condition_en: The main 90-minute prediction for the match, excluding extra time and penalties.
